creator: rootservice@gmail.com
text:
Just for info why i'm looking to unbundle most/all libs, look at these writeups from Flameeyes (Ex Gentoo Developer):
https://blog.flameeyes.eu/2009/01/bundling-libraries-for-despair-and-insecurity
https://blog.flameeyes.eu/2009/03/bundling-libraries-the-curse-of-the-ancients
https://blog.flameeyes.eu/2009/04/security-considerations-scanning-bundled-libraries
https://blog.flameeyes.eu/2011/01/reliable-and-unreliable-detection-of-bundled-libraries
Finally one out of many examples of why this is necessary:
https://blog.flameeyes.eu/2009/08/i-told-you-so-the-expat-debacle
